title: Peppery Portuguese Beef Stir-fry
description: A crispy and flavorful one-pot dish featuring beef stock cubes, infused with a peppery kick for a unique twist on traditional Portuguese cuisine.

ingredients.name: Beef Slices
ingredients.notes: Lean beef, preferably sirloin or tenderloin

ingredients.name: Green Peppers
ingredients.notes: Remove seeds and membranes for a milder flavor, cut into thin slices

ingredients.name: Minced Garlic
ingredients.notes: For extra flavor, but not necessary for a minimalist approach

ingredients.name: Thyme Sprigs
ingredients.notes: Fresh or dried, optional for added depth of flavor

instructions: Season the beef slices with salt and pepper.
In a large skillet over medium heat, add oil. Sear the seasoned beef until golden brown on all sides, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside to rest while you prepare vegetables.
Sauté onions in the same pan for 2 minutes until translucent.
Add bell peppers, green peppers, garlic, and thyme. Stir-fry for another minute until softened but still crisp-tender.
Return the beef to the skillet along with any accumulated juices. Add red pepper flakes.
Stir everything together gently. Cook on medium-high heat for 2-3 minutes or until all ingredients are heated through and combined, adjusting seasoning as needed.
Transfer the dish to a warmed serving plate, garnish with fresh herbs if desired, and serve hot.
